builderStatus: Ready to test one candidate hypothesis
boundaryNote: Candidates are hypothesis tests, not recommended portfolios.

hypotheses.title: Equal Weight diagnostic benchmark
hypotheses.targetProblem: Checks whether concentration risk falls when each holding has the same allocation.
hypotheses.expectedTradeoff: May reduce single-driver dependence, but can dilute intentional exposure and change bond/cash balance.

hypotheses.title: Risk Parity diagnostic benchmark
hypotheses.targetProblem: Checks whether risk contribution can be distributed more evenly across sleeves.
hypotheses.expectedTradeoff: May reduce stress concentration while creating less intuitive allocation weights.

hypotheses.title: Defensive balance hypothesis
hypotheses.targetProblem: Tests whether a modest defensive sleeve increase improves stress resilience.
hypotheses.expectedTradeoff: May improve drawdown behavior but reduce participation in equity upside.
hypotheses.evidenceSource: Evidence Center: rates-up and equity shock findings

constraints: Use the current holdings to keep the comparison focused.
Do not frame candidate as a recommendation.
